body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/dataSource/getMultiLevelDetail/{sourceSeqId} 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/dataSource/getMultiLevelDetail/{sourceSeqId} 
 ## 接口描述 
**用于费控单据配置下的自定义字段的自定义选项根据数据源自增ID查询数据源详细信息**

单据配置 --> 自定义字段 --> 层级选择 --> 对应选项数据源 ：  根据数据源自增ID查询数据源详细信息 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: GET  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"},"children":[]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点"},"children":[]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"sourceSeqId","maxLength":"20","label":"%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%90%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9EID","exampleValue":"1000","required":true,"desc":"%20%E8%B7%AF%E5%BE%84%E5%8D%A0%E4%BD%8D%E7%AC%A6%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0"}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"响应头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"响应体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"data","required":false,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"id","required":false,"label":"%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%90id","exampleValue":"SOUR02","desc":"","maxLength":"128"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"selectSourceName","required":false,"label":"%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%90%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%901%E5%8F%B7","desc":"%20%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%90%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","maxLength":"128"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"optionSaveDtoList","required":false,"label":"%E4%B8%80%E7%BA%A7%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"","desc":"%20%E6%A0%91%E5%BD%A2%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%84%EF%BC%8C%E7%9B%AE%E5%89%8D%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%813%E5%B1%82"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"seqId","required":false,"label":"%E4%B8%80%E7%BA%A7%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E5%94%AF%E4%B8%80%E9%94%AE","exampleValue":"1214876","desc":"","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"selectOptionName","required":false,"label":"%E4%B8%80%E7%BA%A7%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B91","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"optionSaveDtoList","required":false,"label":"%E5%AD%90%E7%BA%A7%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"","desc":"%20*%20%E5%AD%90%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E9%9B%86%E5%90%88%0D%0A*%20%E5%B1%82%E7%BA%A7%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E4%B8%80%E8%87%B4%EF%BC%88%E4%B8%8E%E4%B8%8A%E4%B8%80%E7%BA%A7%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%84%E3%80%81%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E4%B8%80%E6%A0%B7%EF%BC%89%0D%0A*%20%E4%BC%9A%E5%AD%98%E5%9C%A8%E4%B8%8D%E5%9B%BA%E5%AE%9A%E7%9A%84%E5%A4%9A%E7%BA%A7%0D%0A*%20%E7%9B%AE%E5%89%8D%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%813%E5%B1%82"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"seqId","required":false,"label":"%E5%AD%90%E7%BA%A7%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E5%94%AF%E4%B8%80%E9%94%AE","exampleValue":"1214877","desc":"","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"selectOptionName","required":false,"label":"%E5%AD%90%E7%BA%A7%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B911","desc":"","maxLength":"128"}}]}]},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"comId","maxLength":"20","label":"%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8ID","exampleValue":"111"}}]},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%A0%87%E8%AE%B0","exampleValue":"true","desc":"%20true%3A%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%0Afalse%3A%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%81","desc":"%20%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%9A%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%0A%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%9A%E5%85%B7%E4%BD%93%E7%9A%84%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF"}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 ###请求示例
```json
{BaseURL}/api/itrip-gateway/v1/dataSource/getMultiLevelDetail/123
```
###返回示例
```json
{
    "data": {
	"comId":3398,
        "id": "SOUR02",
        "selectSourceName": "数据源1号",
        "optionSaveDtoList": [
            {
                "seqId": 1214876,
                "selectOptionName": "选项1",
                "optionSaveDtoList": [
                    {
                        "seqId": 1214877,
                        "selectOptionName": "选项11",
                        "optionSaveDtoList": [
                            {
                                "seqId": 1214878,
                                "selectOptionName": "选项12",
                                "optionSaveDtoList": null
                            }
                        ]
                    }
                ]
            }
        ]
    },
    "success": true,
    "message": "调用成功！"
}
```  
## 错误码说明 
| **错误码** | **错误描述**        | **备注**                       |
|------------|------------------------|-------------------------------------------|
| 400      | 请联系管理员配置企业信息 | 无                            |
| ERR0000      | 解密失败 | 无                            |
body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/dataSource/getMultiLevelDetail/{sourceSeqId}

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/dataSource/getMultiLevelDetail/{sourceSeqId}

接口描述

用于费控单据配置下的自定义字段的自定义选项根据数据源自增ID查询数据源详细信息

单据配置 --> 自定义字段 --> 层级选择 --> 对应选项数据源 ： 根据数据源自增ID查询数据源详细信息

调用方式

METHOD: GET

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"},"children":[]}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点"},"children":[]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"sourceSeqId","maxLength":"20","label":"%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%90%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9EID","exampleValue":"1000","required":true,"desc":"%20%E8%B7%AF%E5%BE%84%E5%8D%A0%E4%BD%8D%E7%AC%A6%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0"}}]}]}

接口输出参数

{"responseHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"响应头根节点"}}],"responseBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"响应体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"data","required":false,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"id","required":false,"label":"%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%90id","exampleValue":"SOUR02","desc":"","maxLength":"128"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"selectSourceName","required":false,"label":"%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%90%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%901%E5%8F%B7","desc":"%20%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%90%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","maxLength":"128"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"optionSaveDtoList","required":false,"label":"%E4%B8%80%E7%BA%A7%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"","desc":"%20%E6%A0%91%E5%BD%A2%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%84%EF%BC%8C%E7%9B%AE%E5%89%8D%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%813%E5%B1%82"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"seqId","required":false,"label":"%E4%B8%80%E7%BA%A7%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E5%94%AF%E4%B8%80%E9%94%AE","exampleValue":"1214876","desc":"","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"selectOptionName","required":false,"label":"%E4%B8%80%E7%BA%A7%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B91","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"optionSaveDtoList","required":false,"label":"%E5%AD%90%E7%BA%A7%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"","desc":"%20*%20%E5%AD%90%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E9%9B%86%E5%90%88%0D%0A*%20%E5%B1%82%E7%BA%A7%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E4%B8%80%E8%87%B4%EF%BC%88%E4%B8%8E%E4%B8%8A%E4%B8%80%E7%BA%A7%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%84%E3%80%81%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E4%B8%80%E6%A0%B7%EF%BC%89%0D%0A*%20%E4%BC%9A%E5%AD%98%E5%9C%A8%E4%B8%8D%E5%9B%BA%E5%AE%9A%E7%9A%84%E5%A4%9A%E7%BA%A7%0D%0A*%20%E7%9B%AE%E5%89%8D%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%813%E5%B1%82"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"seqId","required":false,"label":"%E5%AD%90%E7%BA%A7%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E5%94%AF%E4%B8%80%E9%94%AE","exampleValue":"1214877","desc":"","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"selectOptionName","required":false,"label":"%E5%AD%90%E7%BA%A7%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B911","desc":"","maxLength":"128"}}]}]},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"comId","maxLength":"20","label":"%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8ID","exampleValue":"111"}}]},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%A0%87%E8%AE%B0","exampleValue":"true","desc":"%20true%3A%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%0Afalse%3A%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%81","desc":"%20%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%9A%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%0A%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%9A%E5%85%B7%E4%BD%93%E7%9A%84%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF"}}]}]}

接口调用示例

###请求示例

{BaseURL}/api/itrip-gateway/v1/dataSource/getMultiLevelDetail/123

###返回示例

{
    "data": {
	"comId":3398,
        "id": "SOUR02",
        "selectSourceName": "数据源1号",
        "optionSaveDtoList": [
            {
                "seqId": 1214876,
                "selectOptionName": "选项1",
                "optionSaveDtoList": [
                    {
                        "seqId": 1214877,
                        "selectOptionName": "选项11",
                        "optionSaveDtoList": [
                            {
                                "seqId": 1214878,
                                "selectOptionName": "选项12",
                                "optionSaveDtoList": null
                            }
                        ]
                    }
                ]
            }
        ]
    },
    "success": true,
    "message": "调用成功！"
}

错误码说明

错误码 错误描述 备注
400 请联系管理员配置企业信息 无
ERR0000 解密失败 无
